2026 WARSAW GHETTO UPRISING CAMPAIGN
We welcome you to join the 2026 Warsaw Ghetto Uprising Campaign. This campaign is hosted yearly by POLIN Museum in Warsaw, Poland. This year we commemorate the 83nd anniversary of the Uprising, and will have many activities for people around the world to participate in.
MORE 
STORIES OF RESCUE

Explore the stories of Poles who helped Jews during World War II. Simply enter the surname of the rescuer, the surname of the person who remained in hiding during the war, the name of the town or city or a phrase you would like to search for.

  SEARCH
Advanced search
READERS’ PICK: THE ATTITUDES OF POLES TOWARDS JEWS DURING THE HOLOCAUST
The extermination of Jews during World War II took place before the eyes of Poles who, at the time, were themselves subjected to the terror of the German occupying force. What was their reaction?
125TH ANNIVERSARY OF THE BIRTH OF MIECZYSŁAW FOGG
He was one of Poland’s most popular singers and composers in the twentieth century. During the Holocaust he extended help to his Jewish friends from the artistic community.
POLES’ REACTION TO THE UPRISING IN THE WARSAW GHETTO
How did Poles react to the Uprising in the ghetto? How was it commented on? What was the reaction of the eye witnesses-passers-by in the streets of Warsaw to the fighting taking place behind the ghetto wall?
